title: Legacy Console Reloaded
description: A reimagining of Legacy Console Edition on Java.
body:
# Legacy Console Reloaded
Experience the feel of Legacy Console Edition reborn on Java Edition.

### Legacy Console Menus
Enjoy the nostalgic menus of Legacy Console Edition. The main menu as well as the options menus are all in the style of Legacy Console Edition. The inventory, crafting menu, and creative menu have all been reworked to replicate their layout and functionality in Legacy Console Editio.

### Legacy Console Mechanics 
Mechanics from Legacy Console Edition have been brought to Java, such as increased flight speed in creative, player bobbing, and Legacy Console's autosaves. The Tutorial World also makes a return, allowing the player to explore a vast premade world.

### Bedrock Edition Parity
In an attempt to mix Bedrock Edition with Legacy Console Edition, many Bedrock Edition features have been ported over as well. The block bridging mechanics in Bedrock Edition can now be toggled on or off. The player's coordinates are dislayed on screen at all times, being able to be deactivated in the settings if desired. The Camera item and Snowy Leaves from Bedrock Edition have also been added. Potions can now be placed into cauldrons, and many items can be dyed by right clicking them with the desired dye. Lastly the Wither boss has been made more difficult, now matching the Bedrock Edition Wither fight.

### Lost Features
Some lost features have also made a return. Cyan Flowers and Roses have been revived for the player to decorate with. Lost recipes, such as crafting an Enchanted Golden Apple, have been brought back. The combat has also been reworked to match the old combat mechanics before the 1.9 update.
